title: verilator does not detect if block name is used twice

features.name: named begin/end block in always_comb
features.description: Code should include a labeled begin/end block using 'begin: LABEL' syntax inside an always_comb procedural block
features.snippet: always_comb begin: COMB integer q_ind; for(q_ind=0; q_ind<NUM_QUEUES-1; q_ind++); end

features.name: duplicate named block labels in same scope
features.description: Code should include two named begin/end blocks with the same label name within the same scope
features.snippet:
always_comb begin: COMB /* ... */ end
for(...): COMB /* ... */ end
